# External Reference Code

This directory is for local clones of third-party reference repositories used by the model track.

Expected local checkouts:

- `libcom/`
- `Object-Placement-Assessment-Dataset-OPA/`
- `TopNet-Object-Placement/` if needed for the optional candidate-generation comparison

The cloned repositories are ignored by Git. Record source URLs, commit hashes, setup notes, and weight links in project docs or experiment notes.
